data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The evidence indicates that only 2 customers have booked the tour, which does not meet the minimum requirement of 4 participants necessary to run the tour. This is explicitly stated in the linked use case, which requires a minimum of 4 participants to avoid cancellation. Therefore, there is a clear gap in satisfying the requirement for the scenario behavior to be confirmed as supported.
gaps: Only 2 customers have booked the tour, failing to meet the minimum requirement of 4 participants.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
